track_description: Exogenous freight-diesel efficiency improvement driven by background procurement, maintenance, and fleet replacement rather than a user-selected package.
evidence_summary: The accepted freight-diesel drift explicitly carries the diesel-intensity decline that was previously embedded in the role method rows and keeps it separate from the existing efficient-diesel pathway method.
derivation_method: Rebaseline the diesel incumbent row to a flat de-embedded trajectory and move the embedded decline into the autonomous track for explicit attribution and scenario control.
double_counting_guardrail: Applies only to the base diesel method after the same improvement is removed from method_years.csv. Efficient-diesel, BEV, and FCEV methods remain excluded.
review_notes: Kept as a narrow incumbent-diesel calibration artifact so the autonomous drift stays distinct from the efficient-diesel pathway method.
